articles.title_en: Hanoi's Yen Xa Wastewater Plant Phase 2 Operational, Elevating Urban Water Quality
articles.summary_en: MONRE hails Yen Xa's second phase completion, funded by JICA, boosting treatment for over 1.5M residents. A milestone for Hanoi's green city goals.

articles.title_en: MONRE Launches Major Industrial Wastewater Program in Mekong Delta with ADB Support
articles.summary_en: MONRE initiates a multi-province project, backed by ADB, to upgrade industrial wastewater treatment in the Mekong Delta, aiming to curb pollution and protect agricultural lands.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's MONRE Unveils New PPP Strategy for Advanced Water Treatment Infrastructure
articles.summary_en: MONRE announces a 2030 strategy to attract private investment via PPPs for advanced wastewater treatment, targeting 90% urban collection and treatment nationwide.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Mandatory Waste Classification Sees Stronger Enforcement in 2026
articles.summary_en: Nationwide enforcement of mandatory waste classification at source intensifies, driving household and business compliance.

articles.title_en: EPR Schemes Drive Recycling Sector Growth as 2026 Targets Met in Vietnam
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's EPR framework for packaging and electronics expands, fostering private sector investment in recycling.

articles.title_en: Stricter Penalties and New Projects Boost Vietnam's Waste Treatment Capacity
articles.summary_en: Enhanced legal enforcement for waste violations coincides with new treatment facility investments across Vietnam.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $500M for Ho Chi Minh City Green Metro Line Expansion
articles.summary_en: The ADB has committed $500M to expand Ho Chi Minh City's sustainable metro network, boosting urban connectivity and reducing emissions.

articles.title_en: Vietnam Secures $300M ADB Loan for Mekong Delta Climate Resilience
articles.summary_en: ADB's $300M loan will fund vital infrastructure in the Mekong Delta, enhancing climate resilience against rising sea levels and extreme weather.

articles.title_en: ADB Backs Vietnam's Digital Transformation with $250M for Rural Broadband
articles.summary_en: A new $250M ADB loan will expand high-speed internet to Vietnam's rural areas, bridging the digital divide and spurring economic growth.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $250M for Vietnam's Central Highlands Water & Sanitation Expansion
articles.summary_en: ADB greenlights a $250M project to expand clean water and wastewater services for 1.5M people in Vietnam's Central Highlands.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Mekong Delta Sees Major Progress in ADB-Funded Clean Water Access by 2026
articles.summary_en: An ADB-backed multi-year project in the Mekong Delta is on track for 2026 completion, providing safe water to 2 million residents.

articles.title_en: Digitalization and Climate Resilience Key to Future Water Projects in Vietnam, Says ADB
articles.summary_en: An ADB forum in Hanoi highlights the critical role of digital tech and climate adaptation in Vietnam's evolving water infrastructure.

articles.title_en: World Bank Unveils $300M Vietnam Water Security and Climate Resilience Project for Mekong Delta in 2026
articles.summary_en: World Bank launches $300M project in Vietnam's Mekong Delta to bolster water security and climate resilience by 2026.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Central Highlands See Major Progress in World Bank-Backed Water & Environment Program by Mid-2026
articles.summary_en: World Bank-supported project significantly boosts clean water access and environmental protection in Vietnam's Central Highlands.

articles.title_en: Sustainable Water Futures: World Bank and Vietnam Outline 2026-2030 Climate Adaptation Strategy
articles.summary_en: World Bank and Vietnam detail a new strategy for sustainable water management and climate adaptation from 2026-2030.

articles.title_en: JICA Commits $500M to Hanoi Metro Line 5 Green Expansion by 2026
articles.summary_en: JICA provides significant ODA loan for Hanoi Metro Line 5 expansion, integrating smart green tech for 2026 completion.

articles.title_en: JICA Grants $120M for Mekong Delta Climate Resilience Phase II Project
articles.summary_en: JICA's new grant targets critical climate adaptation and water management in Vietnam's vulnerable Mekong Delta.

articles.title_en: JICA Supports Binh Duong's Eco-Industrial Park with New ODA Loan
articles.summary_en: A new JICA ODA loan boosts Binh Duong's sustainable industrial park, focusing on green infrastructure and environment.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Industrial Parks Attract Record FDI in Q1 2026, Driven by High-Tech and Green Manufacturing
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's industrial parks saw a 15% increase in FDI in Q1 2026, primarily from high-tech and sustainable sectors.

articles.title_en: Major Infrastructure Upgrades Bolster Vietnam's Industrial Corridor Competitiveness by Mid-2026
articles.summary_en: New expressways and expanded port capacities in southern & northern Vietnam enhance logistics, attracting new investment.

articles.title_en: Smart & Sustainable Industrial Parks Emerge as Key Differentiator for Vietnam's FDI Environment
articles.summary_en: Developers are integrating renewable energy and smart technologies, positioning Vietnam as a hub for future-ready manufacturing.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Offshore Wind Sector Accelerates with PDP8 Implementation, Key Projects Eying FID
articles.summary_en: By 2026, Vietnam's ambitious PDP8 propels offshore wind. Developers secure permits; FID nears for projects targeting 2028+ ops.

articles.title_en: Rooftop Solar Boom Bolsters Vietnam's Energy Security Amidst PDP8 Grid Upgrades
articles.summary_en: 2026 sees Vietnam's rooftop solar surge, easing grid strain. PDP8's focus on distributed generation enhances energy resilience.

articles.title_en: International Backing Crucial for Vietnam's PDP8 Offshore Wind Ambitions
articles.summary_en: In 2026, global investors are key to Vietnam's PDP8 renewable goals, especially offshore wind, addressing financing gaps.

articles.title_en: Long Thanh Airport Phase 1 Advances Towards Late 2026 Partial Opening, Connectivity Crucial
articles.summary_en: Long Thanh Airport's first phase progresses towards a late 2026 partial launch, with expressway and future rail integration critical.

articles.title_en: Ben Luc-Long Thanh Expressway Opens Early 2026, Significantly Boosting Long Thanh Airport Access
articles.summary_en: The Ben Luc-Long Thanh Expressway officially opened early 2026, dramatically improving connectivity to Long Thanh Airport.

articles.title_en: HCMC Fast-Tracks Studies for Long Thanh Airport Rail Link in 2026, Metro Line 2 Expansion on Agenda
articles.summary_en: Ho Chi Minh City accelerates feasibility studies for a dedicated rail link to Long Thanh Airport, alongside Metro Line 2's extension.

articles.title_en: Ho Chi Minh City Unveils Next-Gen Integrated Operations Center, Bolstering Digital Backbone
articles.summary_en: HCMC launches advanced IOC, integrating city services via robust 5G and AI-driven IoT networks.

articles.title_en: Siemens Digital Industries Partners with Da Nang for Smart City Digital Twin Initiative
articles.summary_en: Siemens partners Da Nang for city-wide digital twin, leveraging AI and cloud infrastructure for IOC.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's National Smart City Framework 2030 Prioritizes Secure 5G and Data Centers for IOCs
articles.summary_en: Government report highlights national 5G rollout and secure data infrastructure for smart city IOCs.
